title: Dat Modding API
description: A library containing shared functionality used by Dat Developer mods.
body:
A library containing useful stuff for Dat Developer.

 
This mod does nothing on its own, however, it provides useful components, such as data structures, useful maths functions, chat functions, and a classes for handling delayed code execution.


Feel free to use with your own mod, you can find out how [here](https://github.com/Dat-Developer-Mods/datmoddingapi/wiki/Adding-to-your-project).

 

Feel free to join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/4XbvXtb) for updates and discussion.
